description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a prominent sloped roof and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The front facade includes a balcony with glass railings, a covered entryway, and a driveway leading up to the main entrance. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to outdoor living areas. The exterior is accented by landscaped elements such as palm trees and shrubs, as well as a perimeter fence for privacy. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with a dark roof and light-colored walls. The overall layout suggests a two-story residence with contemporary styling and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a sloped roof, glass balcony, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a mix of open and enclosed spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, glass balcony, driveway, and landscaped palm tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the sloped roof and the solid wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the driveway, side entry, and additional landscaping with trees.
description_view_3: Back view revealing the fenced backyard, multiple windows, and a shaded patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, glass door, and adjacent landscaped area featuring a palm tree
